# Repository Setup

This document tracks the initialization tasks completed for this repository.

## Completed Tasks

### Labels
All labels from `.github/.labels.json` have been imported to the repository.

### GitHub Project
- Project: [Workflow Orchestration Queue](https://github.com/orgs/intel-agency/projects/15)
- Status columns: Not Started, In Progress, In Review, Done

### Branch Protection
- Ruleset: "protected branches - main" applied to `main` branch
- Includes: deletion protection, linear history, required signatures, PR requirements, Copilot review
